programs.title: Animal Fight Club
programs.desc: This time we will see how dangerous they are, among others:majestic grizzlies.The only threat to these powerful bears are other individuals of the same species.We will see a brutal clash of these extremely strong, massive animals.The program also includes big cats that do not tolerate other predators in their territory.A clever serval manages to outsmart the fast cheetahs.We will also look at how the venomous Levantine viper attacks.This episode also includes scenes from Madagascar - a herd of lemurs defends access to food.

programs.title: The Hidden Kingdoms of China
programs.desc: The creators of the program invite you to an expedition through China, the most populous country in the world with towering mountains, plateaus, impenetrable jungle and vibrant bamboo forests.

programs.title: Europe From Above 4
programs.desc: The Old Continent seen from an extraordinary perspective.A bird's eye view will allow you to discover architectural treasures as well as natural gems.Europe will also be shown during different seasons.

programs.title: America's National Parks
programs.desc: The creators of the series discover the majesty of the most interesting national parks located in the USA.They attract millions of tourists from all over the world.You can admire breathtaking landscapes from popular viewpoints.Viewers will see the beauty of eight national parks from a less obvious perspective.They will move not only to the famous Grand Canyon, but also to less familiar places.They will learn about the guards' favorite places and what makes each of these protected areas so special.They will also see what animals live in these places and what their life is like in the bosom of nature.The latest technologies were used to produce the series, including:drones and cameras with telephoto lenses.

programs.title: Savage Kingdom
programs.desc: Nothing will stop ruthless predators on their way to their prey.Their survival depends on large herds of animals that have been coming to the same place year after year for millennia to quench their thirst.Lions, leopards and hyenas know perfectly well that they will not survive if they do not engage in a fierce fight to the death.The creators of the series will show this fight from a different perspective.They will present the brutal world of animals from both the predator and the prey perspective.Viewers will witness a bloody struggle for power against the background of beautiful African landscapes.They will learn the motives behind every move of the fighters and see that it is a world where no one stays on top forever, and only the strongest survive.
